# Notification Sounds

## Required Audio File

Add a notification sound file at: `/sounds/notify.mp3`

### Recommendations:
- **Duration**: 0.3-0.5 seconds (short beep)
- **Format**: MP3 (best browser compatibility)
- **Volume**: Medium (not too loud)
- **Tone**: Pleasant, not jarring
- **Sample rate**: 44.1kHz
- **File size**: < 50KB

### Free Sound Resources:
- Notificationsounds.com
- Freesound.org
- Zapsplat.com

### Example Sounds:
- Short beep
- Gentle chime
- Subtle pop
- Soft ding

The notification system will gracefully handle the missing file and continue to work with visual notifications only.
